title: Constellation Brands to Report Second Quarter Fiscal 2023 Financial Results; Host Conference Call October 6, 2022
text: VICTOR, N.Y., Sept. 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ and STZ.B), a leading beverage alcohol company, announced today it will report financial results for its second quarter ended August 31, 2022, on Thursday, October 6, 2022, before the open of the U.S. markets. A conference call to discuss the financial results and outlook will be hosted by President and Chief Executive Officer, Bill Newlands, and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Garth Hankinson, at 10:30 a.m. EDT, October 6, 2022.
